meta.title: AI training — About Cercle IA
meta.description: Cercle IA trains professionals to use AI with discernment, method and ethics. Founded by Tarik Hennen, AI practitioner since 2021 in high-stakes contexts.

hero.title: You know AI can change the way you work. You're not yet sure whether you can trust it.
hero.description: The hesitation of a lawyer, a doctor or an executive facing a tool they don't fully control is not an obstacle. It's a professional skill functioning exactly as it should.
hero.italic: Good news: that's the right starting point.

probleme.title: You are not the target audience for demos.

pourQui.title: Professionals whose mistakes have a cost.

approche.title: The starting point is not the tool. It's the work.

items.title: Identify what takes time
items.desc: Spot the tasks that absorb energy without creating value, and distinguish those where AI can reliably take over.

items.title: Write precise instructions
items.desc: Learn to write instructions that produce usable results, not results that need to be entirely rewritten.

items.title: Verify the output
items.desc: Recognise when a tool is wrong without signalling it. Know how to evaluate a result before using it.

items.title: Build a lasting method
items.desc: Leave with a practice you can develop on your own. Not a list of features, but a posture of judgement.

formations.title: One principle: start from your reality.

items.pull: Si vous souhaitez réellement dépasser les poncifs que l'on entend sans cesse sur l'IA, c'est la formation qu'il vous faut.
items.name: Laurent Peretti

items.pull: Very concrete, practice-oriented guidance. This comment was not generated by AI.
items.body: I recently completed five 2-hour AI training sessions. Highly recommended for anyone willing to get down to the brass tacks of this intriguing technology.
items.name: Prescillia Algrain

items.pull: Tarik est un excellent pédagogue, très concret, qui sait s'adapter à son audience.
items.name: Vincent Laborderie

items.pull: Sa connaissance fine des forces, des limites et des usages est déterminante pour faire progresser notre équipe internationale.
items.name: Marc D. David

items.question: Who is Tarik Hennen, the founder of Cercle IA?
items.answer: Tarik Hennen is a former lawyer, AI practitioner since 2021 and founder of Cercle IA. A former lawyer at Stibbe and Squire Patton Boggs, he lectures at IHECS and works as an AI trainer at EPHEC and UCLouvain. He trains professionals to use AI with method in high-stakes contexts: law, medicine, consulting, management.

items.question: Which professionals are the Cercle IA programmes suited to?
items.answer: Cercle IA trains professionals whose mistakes have a cost: lawyers and legal professionals (professional secrecy, ethics), doctors and healthcare workers (medical confidentiality, GDPR), executives and managers (governance, decision-making), consultants and analysts (deliverables, research), HR managers (recruitment, personal data).

items.question: What is the Cercle IA teaching approach?
items.answer: Cercle IA's approach starts from real work, not technology. Each programme identifies time-consuming tasks in the profession, teaches how to write precise instructions, how to evaluate AI-generated results and builds a lasting method. Every exercise is grounded in the participant's professional context.

items.question: Where do Cercle IA training sessions take place?
items.answer: Cercle IA training sessions take place online, in person in Brussels (Belgium) or in a hybrid format. In-house sessions can be organised throughout Belgium and in France. No travel required for online sessions.
